Remove command display, add 'New Scramble' button text

- Remove command line display from results
- Add 'New Scramble' text next to refresh icon button

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: render SVG overlay at half resolution to speed up feMorphology

feMorphology is O(pixels) — at 25MP it takes ~55s. Render the SVG at
1/2 size using viewBox scaling, then upscale with Lanczos before
compositing. This makes it ~4× faster (~14s at 25MP) while preserving
the transparency and outline appearance unchanged.

Reverts the double-stroke workaround from the previous commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: add Devpost submission draft and demo recording script

Devpost copy covers all 7 sections with confident, non-defensive tone
focused on the single product narrative. Demo script has 6 timed segments
(3:30 target), specific prompts, fallback notes, and a pre-recording
checklist. Both passed feature gate (Dash + Kenji + judge panel).

Closes cn-1rk, cn-9zm.

commit.message:
Fix mpv: move playback to PlayerContext, fix IPC listener leak, improve exit handling

- mpv now launches independently without opening VideoPlayer overlay
- Fixed IPC listener accumulation by replacing listeners on each registration
- Added quitting flag to distinguish user-initiated quit from mpv window close
- Improved mpv appearance with bottombar OSC layout and maximized window
- Stripped all mpv code from VideoPlayer.tsx (now purely built-in player)
- Background heartbeat for progress reporting runs in PlayerContext for mpv mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Auto-update: download pre-built exe from GitHub Releases + auto-restart

- main.js: add IPC handler 'perform-update' that writes a bat script to
  copy the downloaded exe over the running exe, relaunch, then quit
- renderer.js: replace stub update check with full one-click flow:
  check GitHub API → find portable .exe asset → show 'Install Update'
  button → download with progress → call IPC to install & restart
- index.html: add progress bar element below update message
- styles.css: add .progress-bar / .progress-fill / .progress-label styles
- package.json: add 'publish' config (provider github, B4lmoncl/agent-dashboard)
  so electron-builder uploads the .exe to GitHub Releases on next build

Mobile nav redesign, setup tab, tour, and various UI improvements

- Setup tab groups Alerts, Topics, Groups with Results|Discarded-style subnav
- Mobile breakpoint tightened from 768px to 480px (phone-only)
- Add guided tour (tour.js/tour.css)
- Add mobile.css for all mobile-specific layout overrides
- Topics page improvements and UI polish across scanner, results, and alerts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add sniper track with dual A/B shadow (max3 vs max2)

New concentrated high-velocity signal model targeting BB squeeze + volume
compression + relative strength setups. Dual shadow tracks for 14-day
forward evaluation before promotion.

Signal model (src/signals/sniper.py):
- 5-component scoring: BB squeeze 30%, vol compression 25%, RS vs SPY 20%,
  trend alignment 15%, momentum base 10%
- Hard gates: ATR% < 5.0, volume < 500K, bear regime block, score < 70
- V3 params: stop 1.5×ATR, target 3.0×ATR, hold 7d, trail 1.0%/0.5%

Backtest results (1Y/3Y, all hybrid gates pass):
- Max 3: 84-85% WR, Sharpe 5.4-10.5, sleeve DD 3.8-7.5%
- Max 2: 84-85% WR, Sharpe 7.9-10.1, sleeve DD 6.5-9.0%, +30pp return

Pipeline integration:
- Signal wired into Step 5 (main.py), registered in ranker
- Time stop in performance.py, hard veto in deterministic_synthesizer.py
- Track-aware risk state in capital_guardian.py
- Hybrid promotion gates: raw signal quality + sleeve portfolio reality

Shadow tracks: sniper_v1_max3 (control) vs sniper_v1_max2 (challenger)
Experiments logged as p2b_003 and p2b_004.

fix: resolve all 7 critical architecture violations

#1 — DataSource interfaces: replace @/lib/schema imports with standalone
     record types (CategoryDataSource, TransactionDataSource,
     BudgetSettingDataSource, BudgetDataSource)

#2 — useBudgetSettingEditViewModel: expose command methods

     useState setters; update BudgetSettingEditView accordingly

#3 — GetDashboardDataUseCase: inject today:string via params instead of
     reading new Date() internally; dashboard action computes today

#4 — BudgetRepositoryImpl: remove BudgetSettingDataSource dependency;
     applyBudgetSetting now accepts items from caller; orchestration
     moved to ApplyBudgetSettingUseCaseImpl and GetDashboardDataUseCaseImpl
     (which gains BudgetSettingRepository dependency)

#5 — useTransactionDetailViewModel: remove dead getDashboardDataAction
     cross-feature import and unused Promise.all entry

#6 — ServerContainer: remove DataSource, Repository, and Service fields
     from public interface; only use cases are exposed

  url: "..." }) in known_marketplaces.json, not just plain URL strings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: replace feMorphology SVG filter with double-stroke outline

The feMorphology filter is O(pixels) — on a 25MP export canvas it was
taking 50+ seconds in librsvg, causing Vercel timeouts. Replace with a
double-stroke approach (thick outline polyline behind, route polyline on
top) which is O(route length) and effectively free at any resolution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Stop dishwasher command spam when switch already in desired state

PM was calling turn_on on the dishwasher every 30s even when the switch
was already on. Now only sends HA commands when the switch state differs
from the desired state.

- Internal Linking: shows list of orphan posts with edit links
- Removed batch_ajax buttons, the_content filter, and generate_readiness_enhancement
- Focus Keywords batch is safe (only writes post meta) — kept as-is

commit.message:
fix: replace auth().protect() with explicit redirect in middleware

auth().protect() was causing Clerk to do a protect-rewrite returning 404
for unauthenticated requests (especially in dev mode with dev-browser-missing).
Replacing with explicit NextResponse.redirect to /sign-in ensures unauthenticated
users get a proper 307 redirect rather than a 404.

commit.message:
perf: avoid PNG intermediate in tile stitch to fix Vercel timeout

Replace the intermediate .png().toBuffer() step with raw pixel buffers
throughout the stitch pipeline. Compressing a 5120x5120 tilesheet to
PNG was taking ~48s, causing the 60s Vercel function timeout on large
exports.

Also makes the per-mode pixel budgets configurable via
EXPORT_MAX_PIXELS_OS and EXPORT_MAX_PIXELS_SATELLITE env vars so limits
can be tuned without a deploy.

commit.message:
Include MANIFEST.MF in native image resources

Logback reads version info from JAR manifests. In native images
these aren't available by default, causing the 'versions unknown'
warning. Including MANIFEST.MF resources fixes the root cause.

categories, 111 subcategories). Add `is_recurring` as cross-cutting
subscription tag. Update ADR-08 for hybrid pipeline (rule-based → merchant
cache → Claude Haiku fallback). Add `merchant_categories` cache table and
`detailed_category`, `is_recurring`, `merchant_name_normalised` columns to
transactions. Update all squad plans and foundation prompt accordingly.

commit.message:
feat: add high-resolution image export to planner map

Adds a print/export button to the planner toolbar that generates a
high-resolution JPEG of the route and surrounding map area.

- Toolbar redesigned with icon-based controls and tooltips to
  accommodate the new export action alongside the existing GPX download
- Export mode (Explorer / Landranger / Satellite) is inferred from the
  current map zoom level and offered as a choice in the export UI
- Server-side tile stitching via sharp: fetches OS/satellite tiles in
  parallel, composites them, then overlays the route SVG with start/end
  markers and direction arrows matching the activity map style
- Render dimensions are calculated from the route bbox, stepping down
  zoom levels as needed to stay within per-mode pixel budgets
  (25 MP for OS modes, 10 MP for satellite) so exports always complete
  within Vercel's 60 s function limit
- A token-based render page supports the existing Puppeteer screenshot
  pipeline as a fallback path

Closes #47

Merge branch 'feat/issue-022-feature-based-structure': Refactor to feature-based structure

Complete refactoring from layer-based to feature-based module organization.

Key changes:
- Each feature (auth, transactions, categories, budget-settings, dashboard)
  is now a self-contained vertical slice
- Shared cross-cutting code moved to src/shared/
- All import paths updated across 75+ files

- `@/presentation/providers/*` → `@/shared/presentation/providers/*`

fix: add timeout protection and better logging for auth

- Improve error messages to show timeout errors
- Skip profiles creation temporarily to isolate issues

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: reorganize codebase into feature-based modules

Move from layer-based structure (domain/data/presentation at root) to
feature-based vertical slices. Each feature is now self-contained with
its own domain, data, and presentation layers.

Breaking changes:
- `@/domain/*` → `@/features/*/domain/*`
- `@/data/*` → `@/features/*/data/*`
- `@/presentation/features/*` → `@/features/*/presentation/*`
- `@/di/*` → `@/shared/di/*`
- `@/core/*` → `@/shared/core/*`
- `@/domain/errors/*` → `@/shared/domain/errors/*`
- `@/presentation/navigation/*` → `@/shared/presentation/navigation/*`
- `@/presentation/common/*` → `@/shared/presentation/common/*`

New structure:
- src/features/auth/
- src/features/transactions/
- src/features/categories/
- src/features/budget-settings/
- src/features/dashboard/
- src/shared/

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix receipt modal appearing and WhatsApp issues

**ROOT CAUSE:**
When receipt modal closed, it called onClose() which closed
the PARENT RecordSaleModalV2, unmounting everything and losing state.
This caused:
1. Receipt modal not appearing (state lost on unmount)
2. WhatsApp opening but losing receipt text (state destroyed)

**SOLUTION:**
- Removed onClose() call from receipt modal's onClose handler
- Now receipt modal closes independently
- Parent modal stays open, preserving all state
- User can reopen receipt, share multiple times, or close manually

**BENEFITS:**
✅ Receipt modal appears immediately after completing sale
✅ WhatsApp can open without destroying modal state
✅ User can share receipt multiple times (WhatsApp, email, copy, etc.)
✅ Better UX - explicit control over when to close

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix scrolling in search/album/artist panels + load Deezer albums directly

Scrolling fix (style.css):
- Search panel: move overflow-y: auto from .search-panel to .sp-body
  with min-height: 0 so the body scrolls, header stays pinned above it
- Album/artist panels: move overflow-y: auto from .album-panel to .ap-inner
  with min-height: 0; existing position:sticky header works within it

Deezer album fix (routes/albums.js, public/index.html):
- Backend: handle dz_ prefixed IDs via Deezer album API so clicking a
  Deezer search result always loads the album panel even during Spotify
  rate limits
- Frontend: simplify resolveAndOpenDeezerAlbum to call openAlbumPanel
  directly; guard artist links against null Spotify IDs on Deezer albums
